---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## Use case
<\!-- Describe the problem or workflow gap this would solve.
     "I want to..." is less useful than "When I'm doing X, I can't Y" -->

## Proposed solution
<\!-- What you'd like to see. Be as specific or vague as you like. -->

## Alternatives considered
<\!-- Any workarounds you've tried, or other approaches that could work -->

## Additional context
<\!-- Screenshots, mockups, links to similar tools, etc. -->
